subject: fix(security): address audit findings — validation, type safety, dev guards
body:
- PriceEditor: Add upper bound validation (R999.99 max) to prevent
  nonsensical price entries
- Station detail: Replace unsafe double `as unknown` cast with runtime
  type guard that validates each price row from Supabase
- Admin station list: Replace blind `as AdminStation[]` cast with
  runtime validation filter
- Debug system: Guard DebugPill render and global error capture behind
  `__DEV__` so they never run in production builds
- Station coordinates: Add CHECK constraint migration validating
  lat/lng fall within geographic ranges (-90/90, -180/180)
- +html.tsx: Document that dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage is safe
  (static string constants, no user input)
- TODO.md: Add Security section with prioritized remaining items
  (admin auth, Mapbox token proxy, price_history RLS)

Tags: security, validation, type-safety, audit
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: security-audit
Semver: patch
